headline: 《痴迷》领跑本周，新作蓄势待发
headlineEn: Obsession Leads the Week, New Titles on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《痴迷》《权力的游戏前传：龙族》等持续火热，未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》《奥德赛》备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but Obsession and Game of Thrones Prequel: Dragon Clan remain hot, with upcoming Spider-Man: New Day and Odyssey highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 《痴迷》连续多日霸榜本周趋势
industryHighlights.en: Obsession dominates this week's trending charts for days

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档引期待
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: New Day release date sparks anticipation
Odyssey film adaptation on the way

industryHighlights.text: 无新片上映日，经典IP续作热度不减
industryHighlights.en: No new releases, classic IP sequels remain hot
